name: Eternal Food
desc: A mod that lets you have eternal food by fusing a compatible food item with an eternal diamond.

name: Good Recipes
desc: A mod that allows you to have new varied recipes that are not normally included in the game.

name: Panda HUD
desc: A texture pack that allows you to have a modified HUD with bamboo and other panda themed stuff.

name: Eternal Tools
desc: A mod that lets you have eternal tools by the use of a kit that is embedded in some tools.

name: Pig HUD
desc: A texture pack that allows you to have a modified HUD with carrot and other pig themed stuff.

name: Eternal Food
desc: A hytale mod that lets you have eternal food by fusing a compatible food item in a Eternal Kitchen.
